hypothesis: LightGBM 5-fold stratified CV baseline on 20 numeric features
changes: Load train.csv (800 samples, 20 numeric features, binary target) and test.csv (200 samples)
Apply 5-fold StratifiedKFold cross-validation to preserve class balance

Train LightGBM classifier with small-dataset-friendly hyperparameters: num_leaves=31, learning_rate=0.05, n_estimators=500, min_child_samples=20, subsample=0.8, colsample_bytree=0.8, reg_alpha=0.1, reg_lambda=1.0
Use early_stopping_rounds=50 on a held-out validation fold to prevent overfitting on the small dataset
Collect OOF predictions for all 800 training samples and average test predictions across folds
Evaluate OOF AUC-ROC; generate test submission probabilities
